title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node.js and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, enabling LLM and chat model interfaces.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, supporting chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI for Ollama with interactive chat, prompt templates, and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local AI code completion via Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat interface for Ollama with model selection and parameter tuning.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel package offering a fluent wrapper around the Ollama API for PHP developers.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node to invoke Ollama models within automation workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent volume support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and dependency-injection support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that containerses and orchestrates Ollama for CI/CD pipelines.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama API with GenServer-based process management.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance using Ollama models inside notes.
